title: cotoneaster racemiflorus var. ovalifolius
intro: Cotoneaster racemiflorus var. ovalifolius, also known as the Oval-leaved Cotoneaster or C. ovalifolius, is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its oval-shaped leaves and white, fragrant flowers. This plant is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of C. ovalifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, or extracts, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
